---
title: "Connecting to the HPC system"
---

Once an account has been created and a new password has been set, users can connect to the HPC system. There are two optons for connecting: 

# 1) Web Access through Open OnDemand
Open OnDemand is a web-based portal that provides users with access to HPC resources. It allows users to run jobs, manage files, open a terminal, and access applications through a user-friendly interface. See the [Open OnDemand](ondemand.qmd) page for more information. 

# 2) Command Line Interface
User can connect to the HPC system through a Command Line Interface (CLI) using a terminal. This approach allows for more advanced usage and greater control, but is more complex with a steeper learning curve. See the [Command Line Interface](cli.qmd) page for more information.
